UPDATE sqlite_temp_schema SET sql = sqlite_rename_table(%Q, type, name, sql, %Q, %Q, 1), tbl_name = CASE WHEN tbl_name=%Q COLLATE nocase AND   sqlite_rename_test(%Q, sql, type, name, 1, 'after rename', 0) THEN %Q ELSE tbl_name END WHERE type IN ('view', 'trigger')

INSERT INTO SystemGlobal(Capability, Value) VALUES(?,?)ON CONFLICT(Capability)DO UPDATE SET Value=Excluded.Value;
INSERT INTO UserGlobal(Capability, User, Value) VALUES(?,?,?)ON CONFLICT(Capability, User)DO UPDATE SET Value=Excluded.Value;
INSERT INTO UserGlobalWithConsentID(Capability, User, ConsentID, Value) VALUES(?,?,?,?)ON CONFLICT(Capability, User, ConsentID)DO UPDATE SET Value=Excluded.Value;
INSERT INTO ClassicGlobal(Capability, User, Value) VALUES(?,?,?)ON CONFLICT(Capability, User)DO UPDATE SET Value=Excluded.Value;
INSERT INTO ClassicGlobalWithConsentID(Capability, User, ConsentID, Value) VALUES(?,?,?,?)ON CONFLICT(Capability, User, ConsentID)DO UPDATE SET Value=Excluded.Value;
INSERT INTO App(Capability, User, PackageFamily, Value) VALUES(?,?,?,?)ON CONFLICT(Capability, User, PackageFamily)DO UPDATE SET Value=Excluded.Value;
INSERT INTO AppWithConsentID(Capability, User, PackageFamily, ConsentID, Value) VALUES(?,?,?,?,?)ON CONFLICT(Capability, User, PackageFamily, ConsentID)DO UPDATE SET Value=Excluded.Value;
INSERT INTO MigratedUsers(User, Value) VALUES(?,?)ON CONFLICT(User)DO UPDATE SET Value=Excluded.Value;
INSERT INTO ShowGlobalPrompts(Capability, User, Value) VALUES(?,?,?)ON CONFLICT(Capability, User)DO UPDATE SET Value=Excluded.Value;
INSERT INTO McpConsent(User, Client, Server, Resource, Operation, ExpiryTime, Value) VALUES(?,?,?,?,?,?,?)ON CONFLICT(User, Client, Server, Resource, Operation)DO UPDATE SET Value=Excluded.Value;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS SystemGlobal(Capability TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,Value INTEGER NOT NULL,PRIMARY KEY(Capability));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS UserGlobal(Capability TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,User TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,Value INTEGER NOT NULL,PRIMARY KEY(Capability, User));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ClassicGlobal(Capability TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,User TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,Value INTEGER NOT NULL,PRIMARY KEY(Capability, User));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS App(Capability TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,User TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,PackageFamily TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,Value INTEGER NOT NULL,PRIMARY KEY(Capability, User, PackageFamily));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS UserGlobalWithConsentID(Capability TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,User TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,ConsentID TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,Value INTEGER NOT NULL,PRIMARY KEY(Capability, User, ConsentID));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ClassicGlobalWithConsentID(Capability TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,User TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,ConsentID TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,Value INTEGER NOT NULL,PRIMARY KEY(Capability, User, ConsentID));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS AppWithConsentID(Capability TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,User TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,PackageFamily TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,ConsentID TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,Value INTEGER NOT NULL,PRIMARY KEY(Capability, User, PackageFamily, ConsentID));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS MigratedUsers(User TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,Value INTEGER NOT NULL,PRIMARY KEY(User));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ShowGlobalPrompts(Capability TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,User TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,Value INTEGER NOT NULL,PRIMARY KEY(User, Capability));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS %s(ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,StringValue TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL,UNIQUE(StringValue));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS McpConsent(ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,User INTEGER NOT NULL,Client INTEGER NOT NULL,Server INTEGER NOT NULL,Resource INTEGER NOT NULL,Operation INTEGER NOT NULL,ExpiryTime INTEGER NOT NULL,Value INTEGER NOT NULL,UNIQUE(User, Client, Server, Resource, Operation));
